497: async function resolveRollbackContext(workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string, enabled: boolean, env: Env): Promise<unknown> {
498:   if (!enabled) {
499:     return { status: 'disabled' };
500:   }
501:   const previous = await getLatestSuccessfulWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId);
502:   if (!previous || previous.id === deploymentId) {
503:     return { status: 'no_previous_success' };
504:   }
505:   return {
506:     status: 'retained_previous',
507:     deploymentId: previous.id,
508:     deployedUrl: previous.deployedUrl,
509:     providerDeploymentId: previous.providerDeploymentId,
510:   };
511: }

513: async function resolveRollbackContextSafely(
514:   workspaceId: string,
515:   deploymentId: string,

518: ): Promise<unknown> {

523:       status: 'lookup_failed',

529: async function reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(
530:   env: Env,
531:   workspaceId: string,
532:   deploymentId: string
533: ): Promise<void> {
534:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
535:   if (!deployment) {
536:     return;
537:   }
538: 
539:   if (deployment.status === 'succeeded') {
540:     const hasSucceededEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
541:       env.DB,
542:       workspaceId,
543:       deploymentId,
544:       'deployment_succeeded'
545:     );
546:     if (!hasSucceededEvent) {
547:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
548:         workspaceId,
549:         deploymentId,
550:         eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
551:         payload: {
552:           deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
553:           sourceBundleKey: deployment.sourceBundleKey,
554:           sourceSnapshotSha256: deployment.sourceSnapshotSha256,
555:         },
556:       });
557:     }
558: 
559:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
560:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
561:       status: 'succeeded',
562:       deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
563:       deployedAt: deployment.finishedAt,
564:       errorCode: null,
565:       errorMessage: null,
566:     });
567:     return;
568:   }
569: 
570:   if (deployment.status === 'failed') {
571:     const hasFailedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'deployment_failed');
572:     if (!hasFailedEvent) {
573:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
574:         workspaceId,
575:         deploymentId,
576:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
577:         payload: {
578:           code: deployment.error?.code ?? 'deployment_failed',
579:           message: deployment.error?.message ?? 'Deployment failed',
580:         },
581:       });
582:     }
583: 
584:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
585:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
586:       status: 'failed',
587:       errorCode: deployment.error?.code ?? null,
588:       errorMessage: deployment.error?.message ?? null,
589:     });
590:     return;
591:   }
592: 
593:   if (deployment.status === 'cancelled') {
594:     const hasCancelledEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
595:       env.DB,
596:       workspaceId,
597:       deploymentId,
598:       'deployment_cancelled'
599:     );
600:     if (!hasCancelledEvent) {
601:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
602:         workspaceId,
603:         deploymentId,
604:         eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
605:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
606:       });
607:     }
608: 
609:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
610:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
611:       status: 'cancelled',
612:       errorCode: null,
613:       errorMessage: null,
614:     });
615:   }
616: }

618: async function markDeploymentCancelled(
619:   env: Env,
620:   workspaceId: string,
621:   deploymentId: string,
622:   reason: string
623: ): Promise<void> {
624:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
625:   const cancelledUpdate = await env.DB
626:     .prepare(
627:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
628:        SET status = 'cancelled',
629:            result_json = ?,
630:            error_code = NULL,
631:            error_message = NULL,
632:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
633:            duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
634:            updated_at = ?
635:        WHERE id = ?
636:          AND workspace_id = ?
637:          AND status IN ('queued', 'running')`
638:     )
639:     .bind(JSON.stringify({ reason }), now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
640:     .run();
641: 
642:   if ((cancelledUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
643:     return;
644:   }
645: 
646:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
647:     workspaceId,
648:     deploymentId,
649:     eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
650:     payload: { reason },
651:   });
652:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
653:     deploymentId,
654:     status: 'cancelled',
655:     errorCode: null,
656:     errorMessage: null,
657:   });
658: }

660: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
661:   if (!startedAt) {
662:     return false;
663:   }
664: 
665:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
666:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
667:     return false;
668:   }
669: 
670:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
671: }

680: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
681:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
682:   if (!deployment) {
683:     return;
684:   }
685:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
686:   if (!payload) {
687:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
688:   }
689: 
690:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
691:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
692:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
693:   }
694: 
695:   const validation =
696:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
697:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
698:       : {};
699:   const autoFix =
700:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
701:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
702:       : {};
703:   const cache =
704:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
705:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
706:       : {};
707:   const requestedToolchain =
708:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
709:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
710:       : null;
711:   const deploy =
712:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
713:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
714:       : {};
715:   const validationOptions: DeploymentValidationOptions = {
716:     runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
717:     runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
718:   };
719:   const autoFixOptions: DeploymentAutoFixOptions = {
720:     rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
721:     bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
722:   };
723:   const cacheOptions: DeploymentCacheOptions = {
724:     dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
725:   };
726:   const publishOptions: DeploymentPublishOptions = {
727:     provider: getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(payload.provider, env),
728:     outputDir: parseString(deploy.outputDir),
729:   };
730:   const { runBuildIfPresent, runTestsIfPresent } = validationOptions;
731:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
732:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
733:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
734:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
735:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
736:   try {
737:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
738:   } catch (error) {
739:     throw new PolicyError('invalid_project_root', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
740:   }
741: 
742:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && !publishOptions.outputDir) {
743:     throw new PolicyError(
744:       'provider_invalid_output_dir',
745:       'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider'
746:     );
747:   }
748: 
749:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
750:   try {
751:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
752:   } catch (error) {
753:     if (!(error instanceof PolicyError) || error.code !== 'baseline_missing') {
754:       throw error;
755:     }
756: 
757:     if (!autoFixOptions.rehydrateBaseline) {
758:       throw error;
759:     }
760: 
761:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
762:       workspaceId,
763:       deploymentId,
764:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_attempted',
765:       payload: {},
766:     });
767: 
768:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
769:     if (!rehydrated) {
770:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
771:         workspaceId,
772:         deploymentId,
773:         eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_failed',
774:         payload: {},
775:       });
776:       throw new PolicyError('baseline_rehydrate_failed', 'Workspace git baseline is missing and could not be rehydrated');
777:     }
778: 
779:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
780:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
781:       workspaceId,
782:       deploymentId,
783:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_succeeded',
784:       payload: {},
785:     });
786:   }
787: 
788:   const provenance =
789:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
790:       ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
791:       : {};
792:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
793:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;
794:   if (taskId) {
795:     const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
796:     if (!task) {
797:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_task', 'Referenced taskId does not belong to workspace');
798:     }
799:   }
800:   if (operationId) {
801:     const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
802:     if (!operation) {
803:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_operation', 'Referenced operationId does not belong to workspace');
804:     }
805:   }
806: 
807:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
808:     workspaceId,
809:     deploymentId,
810:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
811:     payload: {
812:       provider: deployment.provider,
813:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
814:       runBuildIfPresent,
815:       runTestsIfPresent,
816:       autoFix: autoFixOptions,
817:       cache: cacheOptions,
818:     },
819:   });
820: 
821:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
822: 
823:   let provider;
824:   let providerChecks;
825:   try {
826:     provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(publishOptions.provider, env);
827:     if (!deployment.providerDeploymentId) {
828:       providerChecks = await provider.precheck();
829:       const failedCheck = providerChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
830:       if (failedCheck) {
831:         throw new PolicyError(failedCheck.code, failedCheck.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed');
832:       }
833:     }
834:   } catch (error) {
835:     const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
836:     if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
837:       throw new QueueRetryError('Provider create deployment request is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
838:     }
839:     throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
840:   }
841: 
842:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
843:     workspaceId,
844:     deploymentId,
845:     eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck',
846:     payload: {
847:       provider: publishOptions.provider,
848:       checks: providerChecks ?? [],
849:       skippedForResume: Boolean(deployment.providerDeploymentId),
850:     },
851:   });
852: 
853:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
854:   try {
855:     toolchain = applyRequestedToolchainOverride(
856:       await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
857:         sandbox,
858:         workspaceProjectRoot
859:       ),
860:       requestedToolchain
861:     );
862:   } catch (error) {
863:     throw new PolicyError('toolchain_detect_failed', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
864:   }
865: 
866:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
867:     workspaceId,
868:     deploymentId,
869:     eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_detected',
870:     payload: toolchain,
871:   });
872: 
873:   if (toolchain.manager === 'unknown') {
874:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
875:       workspaceId,
876:       deploymentId,
877:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_unknown_fallback',
878:       payload: { fallbackManager: 'npm' },
879:     });
880:   }
881: 
882:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
883:     workspaceId,
884:     toolchain,
885:     remediations,
886:   });
887: 
888:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
889:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
890:     (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) || (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild);
891: 
892:   if (autoFixOptions.bootstrapToolchain && shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
893:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
894:       workspaceId,
895:       deploymentId,
896:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_started',
897:       payload: {
898:         manager: toolchain.manager,
899:         version: toolchain.version,
900:       },
901:     });
902:     try {
903:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
904:       if (toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn') {
905:         remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: true });
906:       }
907:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
908:         workspaceId,
909:         deploymentId,
910:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
911:         payload: { manager: toolchain.manager },
912:       });
913:     } catch (error) {
914:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
915:         workspaceId,
916:         deploymentId,
917:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_failed',
918:         payload: {
919:           manager: toolchain.manager,
920:           message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
921:         },
922:       });
923:       throw error;
924:     }
925:   } else {
926:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
927:       workspaceId,
928:       deploymentId,
929:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
930:       payload: { manager: toolchain.manager, skipped: true },
931:     });
932:   }
933:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
934: 
935:   const potentialSecrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
936:   if (potentialSecrets.length > 0) {
937:     throw new PolicyError(
938:       'potential_secrets_detected',
939:       `Potential secrets detected in workspace files: ${potentialSecrets.join(', ')}`
940:     );
941:   }
942: 
943:   const dependencyCacheKey = cacheOptions.dependencyCache ? await makeDependencyCacheKey(workspaceId, toolchain) : null;
944:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
945:     workspaceId,
946:     toolchain,
947:     dependencyCacheKey,
948:     dependencyCacheHit: false,
949:     remediations,
950:   });
951: 
952:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
953:     const existingCache = await getWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, workspaceId, dependencyCacheKey);
954:     if (!existingCache) {
955:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
956:         workspaceId,
957:         deploymentId,
958:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_miss',
959:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey },
960:       });
961:     } else {
962:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
963:         workspaceId,
964:         deploymentId,
965:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_hit',
966:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey, artifactKey: existingCache.artifactKey },
967:       });
968:       try {
969:         const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
970:         const object = bucket ? await bucket.get(existingCache.artifactKey) : null;
971:         if (!object) {
972:           throw new Error('Dependency cache artifact is unavailable');
973:         }
974:         const bytes = new Uint8Array(await object.arrayBuffer());
975:         const artifactSha256 = await sha256Hex(bytes);
976:         if (artifactSha256 !== existingCache.artifactSha256) {
977:           throw new Error('Dependency cache integrity check failed: sha256 mismatch');
978:         }
979:         await restoreDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain, bytes);
980:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
981:           workspaceId,
982:           dependencyCacheHit: true,
983:         });
984:       } catch (error) {
985:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
986:           workspaceId,
987:           deploymentId,
988:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_restore_failed',
989:           payload: {
990:             dependencyCacheKey,
991:             message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
992:           },
993:         });
994:       }
995:     }
996:   }
997: 
998:   if (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) {
999:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1000:       workspaceId,
1001:       deploymentId,
1002:       eventType: 'validation_started',
1003:       payload: { step: 'test' },
1004:     });
1005:     try {
1006:       await runValidationStep(
1007:         sandbox,
1008:         `cd ${shellQuote(workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'test')}`,
1009:         10 * 60 * 1000,
1010:         'validation_tool_missing'
1011:       );
1012:     } catch (error) {
1013:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
1014:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1015:           workspaceId,
1016:           deploymentId,
1017:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
1018:           payload: { step: 'test', message: error.message },
1019:         });
1020:       }
1021:       throw error;
1022:     }
1023:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1024:   }
1025:   if (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) {
1026:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1027:       workspaceId,
1028:       deploymentId,
1029:       eventType: 'validation_started',
1030:       payload: { step: 'build' },
1031:     });
1032:     try {
1033:       await runValidationStep(
1034:         sandbox,
1035:         `cd ${shellQuote(workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'build')}`,
1036:         10 * 60 * 1000,
1037:         'validation_tool_missing'
1038:       );
1039:     } catch (error) {
1040:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
1041:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1042:           workspaceId,
1043:           deploymentId,
1044:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
1045:           payload: { step: 'build', message: error.message },
1046:         });
1047:       }
1048:       throw error;
1049:     }
1050:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1051:   }
1052: 
1053:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
1054:     const archive = await createDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain);
1055:     if (archive) {
1056:       const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
1057:       if (bucket) {
1058:         const artifactKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/dependency-caches/${dependencyCacheKey}.tar.gz`;
1059:         await bucket.put(artifactKey, archive.bytes, {
1060:           httpMetadata: { contentType: 'application/gzip' },
1061:           customMetadata: {
1062:             workspace_id: workspaceId,
1063:             cache_key: dependencyCacheKey,
1064:             manager: toolchain.manager,
1065:           },
1066:         });
1067:         await upsertWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, {
1068:           id: `wdc_${dependencyCacheKey.slice(0, 24)}`,
1069:           workspaceId,
1070:           cacheKey: dependencyCacheKey,
1071:           manager: toolchain.manager,
1072:           managerVersion: toolchain.version,
1073:           projectRoot: toolchain.projectRoot,
1074:           lockfileName: toolchain.lockfile?.name ?? null,
1075:           lockfileSha256: toolchain.lockfile?.sha256 ?? null,
1076:           artifactKey,
1077:           artifactSha256: archive.sha256,
1078:           artifactBytes: archive.bytes.byteLength,
1079:         });
1080:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1081:           workspaceId,
1082:           deploymentId,
1083:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_saved',
1084:           payload: {
1085:             dependencyCacheKey,
1086:             artifactKey,
1087:             artifactBytes: archive.bytes.byteLength,
1088:           },
1089:         });
1090:       }
1091:     }
1092:   }
1093: 
1094:   const sourceBundle = await createDeploymentBundle(sandbox);
1095:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1096:   const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
1097:   if (!bucket) {
1098:     throw new Error('No artifact bucket is configured for workspace deployment');
1099:   }
1100: 
1101:   const sourceBundleKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/deployments/${deploymentId}/${sourceBundle.objectKeySuffix}`;
1102:   await bucket.put(sourceBundleKey, sourceBundle.bytes, {
1103:     httpMetadata: {
1104:       contentType: 'application/gzip',
1105:     },
1106:     customMetadata: {
1107:       workspace_id: workspaceId,
1108:       deployment_id: deploymentId,
1109:       source_snapshot_sha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1110:     },
1111:   });
1112:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1113:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
1114:     workspaceId,
1115:     sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1116:     sourceBundleKey,
1117:   });
1118: 
1119:   let outputBundle = sourceBundle;
